items.title: [正面] Great game! Love the visuals and gameplay. It's re...
items.summary: Great game! Love the visuals and gameplay. It's really easy to gain currency in this game, so it's easy to get characters. The story is interesting enough so far.
items.review: Great game! Love the visuals and gameplay. It's really easy to gain currency in this game, so it's easy to get characters. The story is interesting enough so far.

items.title: [正面] Great lore, good art, seems to be pretty heavy tow...
items.summary: Great lore, good art, seems to be pretty heavy towards whales, the amount of actions you can do in 1 turn generally seems lacking but I'm still pretty early on, overall fun though
